notes.title: Task Management Features
notes.content:
This app is designed to manage daily tasks efficiently.

  • Create, edit and delete tasks

  • Mark tasks as complete or active

  • Pin important tasks

  • Use tags to organise task
notes.summary: Overview of task manager features including CRUD and organisation tools.

notes.title: Handling Task State
notes.content:
All tasks are managed in a central state.

  • Each task includes metadata like tags and timestamps

  • UI updates instantly when tasks change

  • Local storage used for persistence
notes.summary: All tasks are managed in a central state.. • Each task includes metadata like tags and timestamps. • UI updates instantly when tasks change. • Local storage use... (AI summary)

notes.title: Task Filtering & Search
notes.content:
Users can easily find tasks using filters.

  • Filter by completed or active tasks

  • Search tasks with debounced input

  • Multiple filters work together
notes.summary: Users can easily find tasks using filters.. • Filter by completed or active tasks. • Search tasks with debounced input. • Multiple filters work together.... (AI summary)

notes.title: Component Structure
notes.content:
The UI is split into reusable components.

  • Task card for each item

  • Task list container

  • Separate input and controls

This makes the app easier to maintain.
notes.summary: The UI is split into reusable components.. • Task card for each item. • Task list container. • Separate input and controls. This makes the app easier to maintai... (AI summary)

notes.title: Performance Considerations
notes.content:
Optimisations to keep the app fast:

  • Debounced search input

  • Memoisation to reduce re-renders

notes.title: Accessibility
notes.content:
Accessibility improvements include:

  • Keyboard navigation

  • Focus states for actions

  • Readable colour contrast

notes.title: Challenges Faced
notes.content:
Some challenges while building:

  • Handling multiple filters together

  • Keeping state and storage in sync

Used derived state to solve filtering complexity.

notes.title: Future Improvements
notes.content:
Next steps for the app:

  • Drag-and-drop task reordering

  • User accounts
notes.summary: Outlines future plans for the task manager.
